title: Symmetry discovery vs hard-negative mining for generative models (EqM)
phase: v14 CPU ladder DONE — v14 NOT authorized (discovered distribution == random; nothing to discover for known/generic CIFAR translation). Bridge concluded.
research_question: Can a learned manifold-preserving operator, anchored to data (not the live field), discover a nonlinearly-hidden symmetry and fill held-out manifold regions? vs hard-negative mining and known-symmetry constraints.
scale: CPU toy (2D/16D rings). NOT publishable; filters/diagnostics only.

ladder_status.rung1_arithmetic: equivariance constraint perfect; hard-neg mining dead
ladder_status.rung2_ring_linear: known + discovered rotation both work (symmetry linear in observed)
ladder_status.rung5_oracle_latent_control: recipe collapses M->identity even with perfect latent (recipe bug exposed)
ladder_status.rung8_identity_exclusion: FAIL (M drifts to non-symmetry; closure can't anchor)
ladder_status.rung9_frozen_anchor: PARTIAL: frozen anchor FIXES field co-adaptation (T_onman 0.00->0.70) but distributional anchor under-constrains operator -> random on-manifold shuffle (shift_std ~95deg), arc not filled. FROZEN~=VISIBLE (no symmetry learned).
ladder_status.rung10_frozen_anchor_coherent: PARTIAL SUCCESS (best yet): single latent matrix fixes coherence (shift_std 95->25), recovers real rotation (M_angle ~-39deg), recall floor0.002->0.025 (12x floor, ~37% of ORACLE 0.068). All 3 blockers (identity/co-adaptation/coherence) now individually fixed. Remaining gap = single-generator vs full-group COVERAGE + imperfect latent + seed variance.
ladder_status.rung11_orbit_augmentation: Coverage hypothesis REJECTED: orbit aug == single aug (recall 0.024 both). Gap to ORACLE is NOT coverage but operator PRECISION (discovered M is fuzzy/seed-variable rotation, shift_std 25, M_off 1.04). FINAL: discovery possible-in-principle but imprecise -> below known-symmetry quality.
ladder_status.rung12_group_generator: SUCCESS - near-oracle discovery. Group-structured generator M=exp(theta*A) fixes operator precision: shift_std 25->0.8(skew)/7.6(free); M_det 0.56->1.00(skew)/0.90(free); recall 0.024->0.071(SKEW = ORACLE 0.067)/0.046(FREE ~69% ORACLE). SKEW recovers exact rotation (~3deg/seed). Gap was PRECISION not impossibility.
ladder_status.rung13_prior_budget: STRONG SUCCESS: GEN_FREE_STABLE (det~1 + well-conditioned, NO skew/rotation naming) = 99% ORACLE (recall 0.067, det 1.00, shift_std 0.84, angle within 2.8deg) -- MATCHES GEN_SKEW. Rotation EMERGES from stability prior; not needed to name it. Active ingredient = condition-number penalty (FREE w/o it stalls 69%). CAVEAT: 2D conflates stable~=rotation; definitive test needs higher-dim latent (rung14).
ladder_status.rung14_higher_dim: DEFINITIVE SUCCESS: K=3 cylinder (rot in plane, h passive, stable!=rotation). GEN_FREE_STABLE (general 3x3, det~1+cond->1, NO skew/plane) = 113% ORACLE, MATCHES both skew arms. Discovered rotation CONFINED to active plane (passive_leak 0.04~=0) + h PRESERVED (passive_dh 0.15 = plane-told ref) + exact group (det 1.00 cond 1.00). 2D-conflation caveat DISSOLVED.
ladder_status.rung15_learned_latent: PARTIAL: learned/recon latent reaches 89-97% recall BUT via COVERAGE not coherent symmetry (shift_std 34-69 vs supervised 3.4; passive_dh 0.96 vs 0.15 -> doesn't preserve true h). Stable on-manifold reshuffle covers 2D cylinder incl arc -> fills via coverage. recall is coverage-confounded; operator-quality metrics honest. Coherent discovery needs structure-ALIGNED coords; recon-only (0.196) faithful but not aligned. Open: symmetry-aware unsupervised latent (deferred, new mechanism).
ladder_status.rung16_screw: INCONCLUSIVE (2 attempts, stop-rule). v1 C=0.4 confounded (helix~circle, rotation suffices, ISOMETRY 95%); v2 C=1.5 messy (ORACLE fills only 25% ideal, operators off-manifold T_onman 0.2-0.65, incoherent, recall COVERAGE-confounded: ISOMETRY htrans~0 yet 79%). Non-rotation discovery UNRESOLVED; screw toy ill-posed. No claim recipe handles non-rotation.
ladder_status.eqm_bridge_feature_proxy: Fast CIFAR feature-space proxy (frozen random-conv+PCA32, rotation gap). KNOWN_AUG closes gap (0.18<<base 1.07, gate OK); RANDOM fails (off-manifold); DISCOVERED stable-generator = stable(det1,cond1.1)+beats-random BUT ~= BASE on held-out gap (1.19) -> anchor-matching doesn't target held-out (rung9/15 confound; frozen feature space not symmetry-aligned). Mechanism FAILS in CIFAR feature space as-is.
ladder_status.eqm_bridge_spatial_proxy: SUPERSEDED by _v2 below. (Original claimed 'targeting open / anchor direction-agnostic / wrong -23deg direction' -- that was a BUG ARTIFACT: the @no_grad encoder blocked the anchor gradient to A, so the operator was driven only by move+stability and its sign was the init seed; and move_target=20deg leaked the held-band magnitude.)
ladder_status.eqm_bridge_spatial_proxy_v2: CORRECTED (2026-06-04, results_spatial_proxy_v2.json): fixed grad-flowing frozen encoder + non-leaking move HINGE[5,45deg] + MIXTURE-anchor objective ((1-pi)real + pi*T(real) ~= real). RESULT PASSES: MIXTURE_SINGLE gap_HO 0.305 (angle +29.5, det0.99 cond1.13) << base 1.065, ~near KNOWN 0.182, beats random 1.41. T-only undershoots (+4.9deg, sits at move floor: visible mass dominates anchor so small rotation already matches bulk); mixture decouples bulk-coverage from gap-fill -> discovers correct direction+magnitude UNSUPERVISED (held band enters only as unlabeled anchor mass). Once grad flows, direction is DETERMINED (inverse worse) -> 'gauge' reading was itself a symptom of the no-grad bug. Anchor-matching is NOT direction-agnostic; the mass-mismatched T-only objective was. Controls clean (random/random_bidir/PCA_linear ~= base). Architecture critique still valid. Mechanism now warrants a LONG CIFAR/FID run (40ep was noise-limited).
ladder_status.v14_distribution_ladder: A,B,C PASS (distribution covers 2D region single can't); D DECISIVE NEG (disc dist ~= random dist on classifier robustness, 3 seeds); E inconclusive (no signal). v14 NOT authorized: for known/generic CIFAR symmetry discovery adds nothing over random crop.

key_findings: Hard-negative/v10 mining installs no manifold structure. Dead.

Recipe (frozen anchor + coherent group generator exp(A) + stability reg) achieves near-oracle COHERENT discovery for ROTATION/ISOMETRIC symmetries in a CLEAN supervised/aligned latent, incl higher-dim K=3 with correct active-subspace selection (rungs 12-14).

CROSS-CUTTING: held-out recall is COVERAGE-confounded (rungs 15-16: high recall with off-manifold/incoherent operators). Trust operator-quality metrics (on-manifold, shift coherence, structure preservation), not recall alone.
OUTSIDE the clean-rotation regime, discovery degrades to coverage-recall WITHOUT coherent symmetry: learned/unaligned latent (rung15) incoherent; non-rotation screw (rung16) inconclusive/ill-posed.
EqM bridge plan written (v12 frozen stable-generator aug, middle-block feature anchor); real validation needs cluster (2FA).

next_action.command: Await direction; bridge concluded (v12 rotation / v13 single / v14 distribution all non-superior vs known crop)
next_action.reason: v14 ladder: discovery mechanism works (A-C) but discovered distribution == random distribution in value (D). Nothing to discover for known/generic translation on CIFAR.
next_action.hint: Discovery only earns its keep for UNKNOWN/non-generic symmetries (toy ladder). Still pending: update v10_hardneg bridge FID (job 19405301) when done.

needs_user_input.prompt: v14 ladder complete: NOT authorized for CIFAR/FID. Distribution mechanism fixes v13 under-diversity (rungs A-C) but discovered distribution == random distribution on downstream robustness (rung D, 3 seeds) -> for known/generic CIFAR translation, discovery adds nothing over random crop. Bridge direction concluded. Awaiting next direction. (v10 bridge FID still to be filled in.)

completed_runs.result: PARTIAL: recall transfers via coverage, coherent symmetry needs aligned coords
DEFINITIVE SUCCESS: stability prior = oracle in K=3 (stable!=rotation), discovers active plane + preserves passive dim
STRONG SUCCESS: stability-only prior = 99% ORACLE (rotation emerges, not named)
PARTIAL SUCCESS (coherence fixed, partial arc fill)

events.detail: Project created from diff-EqM symmetry-toys investigation (rungs 1-9). Houses ladder scripts, findings, control methodology.
Coherent single-matrix operator + frozen anchor -> partial discovery success; 3-layer blocker resolved in principle.
Orbit aug rejected coverage hypothesis; gap is operator precision. Ladder concluded: discovery partial+imprecise, known-symmetry remains best lever.
Group-structured generator achieves near-oracle latent symmetry discovery; precision was the gap. Verdict revised: discovery VIABLE.
Prior-budget: stability-only prior (no rotation naming) reaches oracle (99%); rotation emerges. 2D-conflation caveat -> rung14 higher-dim definitive test.
Class-agnostic stability prior reaches oracle in K=3 (stable!=rotation); discovers active subspace + preserves passive dim. 2D caveat dissolved. Discovery viable with minimal prior.
Learned latent: recall via coverage, not coherent symmetry. Coherent discovery needs structure-aligned coords. Deferred learned-latent coherence; proceeding to rung16 richer group with clean latent.
Screw toy inconclusive x2 (stop-rule). Scope corrected: validated for clean-rotation regime; recall coverage-confounded outside it. Toy ladder paused; bridge needs cluster 2FA.
v12 frozen-anchor stable-generator aug implemented (_stable_operator/v12/vK + 5 configs); local CPU smoke on real CIFAR PASS; full run blocked on cluster 2FA.
Fast feature-proxy: discovered stable-generator stable+beats-random but ~=base on held-out gap; mechanism fails in CIFAR feature space (not symmetry-aligned). Do not extend FID. Proxy saved hours.
Architecture fixed (spatial op = coherent rotation) but targeting open (anchor-matching direction-agnostic; one-sided held-out unreachable). Do not scale FID; known-aug is the lever.

provenance.informs: diff-EqM v10 direction (prefer known-symmetry constraints over hard-negative mining)
